title: cyclosorus bakeri
intro: Cyclosorus bakeri, also known as the Baker's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cyclosorus bakeri include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or poultices, and can also be used as a topical application for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
